content:
gan liu

Posted on Jun 28

#javascript
#beginners
#webdev

My brother and his wife were worried their baby was too small. They manually looked up WHO growth charts and did math. As the family tech guy, I built a solution.

BabPercent.com - enter your baby's age, weight, and height, and it shows exactly which percentile they're in using WHO standards. Track over time to see the growth curve.

Free, no ads, no sign-up.
